## Summary

Describe the change briefly and concretely.

## Scope

- [ ] core library
- [ ] benchmarks
- [ ] analysis
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] reproducibility workflow
- [ ] tests

## Validation

List the commands that were run and the outcomes that matter.

```bash
# commands
```

## Checklist

- [ ] the change is scoped narrowly and intentionally
- [ ] tests were added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] documentation was updated when behavior or workflow changed
- [ ] no local-only artifacts, raw data, logs, or generated outputs were added
- [ ] paper-facing behavior remains unchanged, or the change is an explicit fix
